messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a professional PowerPoint presentation for C-Suite executives in the Finance industry detailing our Q4 financial performance, consisting of exactly 15 slides with a corporate theme using a blue and gray color palette. The output filename must be "Q4_Financials.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard financial metrics. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PALETTE = {
    "navy": "#0A2463",
    "blue": "#1E5AA8",
    "light_blue": "#3D9BD9",
    "teal": "#00B4D8",
    "slate": "#2C3E50",
    "dark_gray": "#34495E",
    "gray": "#7F8C8D",
    "light_gray": "#ECF0F1",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
}

FONT_TITLE = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_NUMBER = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"]):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex="#FFFFFF", alignment=None, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    p.font.name = font_name
    if alignment:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, fill_hex=PALETTE["white"], border_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_hex)
    if border_hex:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_hex)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_pos):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.7), y_pos, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["teal"])
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), y_pos - Inches(0.02), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(7.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.35), "CONFIDENTIAL — Q4 Financial Performance Review", font_size=9, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], font_name="Calibri")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.35), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], font_name="Calibri")


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text=""):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["light_gray"])
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gray"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.4)) / 2, width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4), alt_text, font_size=11, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=PALETTE["teal"], thickness=Pt(3)):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, thickness)
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, categories, series_data):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = list(categories)
    for series_name, values in series_data.items():
        chart_data.add_series(str(series_name), values)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    return chart_frame


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "Q4 Financial Performance", font_size=48, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(3), PALETTE["teal"])
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), "Quarterly Review — Fiscal Year 2024", font_size=24, color_hex=PALETTE["light_blue"], font_name="Calibri")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(8), Inches(0.5), "Prepared for the Board of Directors and Executive Leadership Team", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"])
    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Executive Summary", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    metrics = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$2.8B", "+12% YoY"),
        ("Net Income", "$680M", "+18% YoY"),
        ("EBITDA Margin", "31.5%", "+210 bps"),
        ("EPS (Diluted)", "$4.72", "+22% YoY"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (label, value, change) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.6), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), change, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#27AE60")

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def slide_03_revenue_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Revenue Overview", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    categories = ["Q1 2024", "Q2 2024", "Q3 2024", "Q4 2024"]
    series_data = {"Revenue ($M)": [620, 680, 710, 790]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.5), categories, series_data)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes[-1]
    plot = chart_frame.chart.plots[0]
    if hasattr(plot.series[0].format.fill, "solid"):
        pass
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), "Revenue grew 12% year-over-year to $2.8B in Q4, driven by strong demand across all business segments and successful pricing initiatives.", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["white"])
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.5), "Q4 Revenue: $790M", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["teal"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(4.1), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.5), "Full Year Revenue: $2.8B", font_size=20, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["light_blue"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def slide_04_revenue_by_segment(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue by Segment"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Revenue by Segment", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    categories = ["Enterprise Software", "Cloud Services", "Professional Services", "Hardware & Licensing"]
    series_data = {"Q4 Revenue ($M)": [380, 260, 95, 55]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5), categories, series_data)

    segment_info = [
        ("Enterprise Software", "38%", "$380M"),
        ("Cloud Services", "26%", "$260M"),
        ("Professional Svcs", "12%", "$95M"),
        ("Hardware & Lic.", "7%", "$55M"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.4)
    card_height = Inches(0.8)
    gap = Inches(0.15)
    y_start = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (name, pct, rev) in enumerate(segment_info):
        x = Inches(6.7)
        y = y_start + i * (card_height + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.08), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.25), name, font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.4), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3), f"{pct} — {rev}", font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], bold=True)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def slide_05_profitability_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Profitability Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Profitability Analysis", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    metrics = [
        ("Gross Margin", "68.2%", "+320 bps"),
        ("Operating Income", "$520M", "+15% YoY"),
        ("Net Profit Margin", "24.3%", "+190 bps"),
        ("Return on Equity", "28.7%", "+4.2 pts"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.6)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (label, value, change) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.6), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), change, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#27AE60")

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_data = {"Gross Margin %": [65.0, 66.8, 67.5, 68.2]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(12), Inches(3.0), categories, series_data)

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def slide_06_ebitda_margins(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "EBITDA & Margin Expansion"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "EBITDA & Margin Expansion", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    categories = ["Q1 2023", "Q2 2023", "Q3 2023", "Q4 2023", "Q1 2024", "Q2 2024", "Q3 2024", "Q4 2024"]
    series_data = {
        "EBITDA ($M)": [580, 610, 640, 670, 690, 720, 750, 790],
        "EBITDA Margin %": [28.5, 29.0, 29.8, 30.2, 30.5, 31.0, 31.2, 31.5],
    }
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.5), categories, series_data)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), "EBITDA expanded 18% YoY to $790M in Q4, with margin improvement driven by operating leverage and cost optimization programs.", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["white"])
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.5), "EBITDA Margin: 31.5%", font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["teal"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.8), Inches(4.1), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.5), "Margin Expansion: +210 bps", font_size=20, bold=True, color_hex="#27AE60", font_name=FONT_NUMBER)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def slide_07_cash_flow_statement(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Cash Flow Statement"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Cash Flow Statement", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    cash_items = [
        ("Operating Cash Flow", "$920M", "+14% YoY"),
        ("Capital Expenditures", "($310M)", "-8% vs prior"),
        ("Free Cash Flow", "$610M", "+25% YoY"),
        ("Share Repurchases", "($200M)", "On track"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (label, value, note) in enumerate(cash_items):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), label, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.6), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), note, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"])

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_data = {"Free Cash Flow ($M)": [120, 145, 160, 185]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.8), Inches(12), Inches(2.8), categories, series_data)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def slide_08_balance_sheet_highlights(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Balance Sheet Highlights"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Balance Sheet Highlights", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    bs_items = [
        ("Total Assets", "$28.5B", "+9% YoY"),
        ("Cash & Equivalents", "$4.2B", "+$680M"),
        ("Total Debt", "$7.8B", "Maintained"),
        ("Shareholders' Equity", "$14.3B", "+11% YoY"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.6)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (label, value, note) in enumerate(bs_items):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.6), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), note, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"])

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_data = {"Total Debt ($B)": [8.1, 8.0, 7.9, 7.8]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(3.2), categories, series_data)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(5.4), Inches(3.2), "Strong balance sheet with $4.2B in cash and manageable debt levels. Debt-to-equity ratio improved to 0.55x from 0.61x year-over-year.", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["white"])

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def slide_09_yoy_comparison(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Year-over-Year Comparison"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Year-over-Year Comparison", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    categories = ["Revenue ($M)", "Gross Profit ($M)", "Operating Income ($M)", "Net Income ($M)", "EPS ($)"]
    series_data = {
        "FY 2023": [2500, 1675, 450, 580, 3.95],
        "FY 2024": [2800, 1910, 520, 680, 4.72],
    }
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(12), Inches(4.5), categories, series_data)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def slide_10_regional_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Regional Performance"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Regional Performance", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    regions = [
        ("North America", "$1.2B", "+10%", "43%"),
        ("Europe", "$890M", "+14%", "32%"),
        ("Asia Pacific", "$560M", "+16%", "20%"),
        ("Latin America", "$150M", "+8%", "5%"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (region, rev, growth, share) in enumerate(regions):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.1), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), region, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.5), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), rev, font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.0), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), f"Growth: {growth} | Share: {share}", font_size=13, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"])

    categories = ["North America", "Europe", "Asia Pacific", "Latin America"]
    series_data = {"Revenue ($M)": [1200, 890, 560, 150]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.4), Inches(12), Inches(3.2), categories, series_data)

    add_footer(slide, 10)


def slide_11_cost_management(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Cost Management Initiatives", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    initiatives = [
        ("Operational Efficiency", "85%", "$120M savings"),
        ("Technology Modernization", "72%", "$85M savings"),
        ("Supply Chain Optimization", "90%", "$65M savings"),
        ("Workforce Restructuring", "60%", "$45M savings"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    card_height = Inches(1.7)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (name, progress, savings) in enumerate(initiatives):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), name, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.6), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), progress, font_size=32, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), savings, font_size=14, color_hex="#27AE60", bold=True)

    categories = ["Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4"]
    series_data = {"Cost Savings ($M)": [28, 32, 35, 40]}
    add_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.6), Inches(12), Inches(3.0), categories, series_data)

    add_footer(slide, 11)

def slide_13_key_metrics_dashboard(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["navy"])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Metrics Dashboard"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "Key Metrics Dashboard", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.15), Inches(4))

    kpis = [
        ("Revenue Growth", "+12%", "Target: +10%"),
        ("Gross Margin", "68.2%", "Target: 67%"),
        ("Operating Margin", "18.6%", "Target: 18%"),
        ("ROE", "28.7%", "Target: 25%"),
        ("FCF Conversion", "84%", "Target: 80%"),
        ("Customer Retention", "96.3%", "Target: 95%"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.8)
    card_height = Inches(1.2)
    gap_x = Inches(0.2)
    gap_y = Inches(0.2)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (metric, value, target) in enumerate(kpis):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap_x)
        y = y_pos + row * (card_height + gap_y)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, PALETTE["white"])
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.1), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), metric, font_size=14, color_hex=PALETTE["slate"], bold=True)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.45), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"], font_name=FONT_NUMBER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.85), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), target, font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"])

    add_footer(slide, 13)

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_revenue_overview(prs)
    slide_04_revenue_by_segment(prs)
    slide_05_profitability_analysis(prs)
    slide_06_ebitda_margins(prs)
    slide_07_cash_flow_statement(prs)
    slide_08_balance_sheet_highlights(prs)
    slide_09_yoy_comparison(prs)
    slide_10_regional_performance(prs)
    slide_11_cost_management(prs)
    slide_12_capital_allocation(prs)
    slide_13_key_metrics_dashboard(prs)
    slide_14_outlook_guidance(prs)
    slide_15_thank_you(prs)

    prs.save("Q4_Financials.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
